infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to read printed text aloud.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app does not save photos, but the camera system requires this permission.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone for voice commands.
infoPlist.NSSpeechRecognitionUsageDescription: This app uses speech recognition for voice commands.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Blind Document Reader to use the microphone for voice commands.
plugins.speechRecognitionPermission: Allow Blind Document Reader to use speech recognition for voice commands.
